name: 神秘人
base_prompt: mysterious hooded figure, face obscured by shadow, tall 185cm, dark hooded cloak, only chin visible

variants.watching: standing still, arms hidden, observing from distance
variants.revealing: hood falling back, revealing scarred face, cold smirk
variants.fighting: dual daggers drawn, swift stance, cloak billowing
variants.vanishing: dissolving into black mist, only afterimage remaining

negative_base: bright, cheerful, cartoon, deformed, visible face fully
costume_default: black hooded cloak, dark leather armor, knee boots
